data.description:

data.title: Record $12M Crypto Donation to Reform Rocks UK Politics as Government Weighs Ban
data.description:
Reform UK secured a record=breaking $12 million donation from crypto investor Christopher Harborne just as the UK government considers banning cryptocurrency donations to political parties.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/record-12m-crypto-donation-to-reform-rocks-uk-politics-as-government-weighs-ban/

data.title: Indian crypto investors shift toward more diversified portfolios, CoinDCX finds
data.description:
According to CoinDCX’s annual report for 2025, an average investor now holds 4–6 tokens against the earlier 2–3 in 2022. These trends come as the Indian crypto market recorded a total spot trading volume of $618. 5 million for 2025, with an average monthly trading volume of $51. 6 million. Portfolio makeup has changed from speculation-driven bets […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/indian-crypto-investors-shift-portfolios/

data.title: Pepe memecoin price rise under pressure after website is hacked
data.description:
PEPE memecoin price rises 4. 46% despite its website being hacked. Technical indicators signal a bullish momentum for PEPE amid strong trading volume. Retail and institutional interest support the memecoin’s bullish momentum amid broader market trends
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/pepe-memecoin-price-rise-under-pressure-after-website-is-hacked/

data.title: Chainlink Surges After Grayscale’s New ETF Launch as Analysts Point to Renewed Strength
data.description:
Chainlink (LINK) is showing renewed momentum this week, supported by a strong technical setup and a major institutional catalyst: the launch of Grayscale’s new spot ETF, “GLNK,” on NYSE Arca.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/chainlink-surges-after-grayscales-new-etf-launch-as-analysts-point-to-renewed-strength/

data.title: Deutsche Börse Partners With Kraken to Connect Traditional Markets and Digital Assets
data.description:
